title: She360 Maternal Health Hub — Lahore
description: Community-led antenatal care, skilled birth attendance training, and tele-triage for peri-urban women in Lahore.

title: Women MSME Accelerator — Karachi
description: Digital bookkeeping, market linkages, and interest-free revolving capital for women-led micro-enterprises in Korangi and Landhi.

title: Rural Punjab Girls' Secondary Completion
description: Safe transport stipends, remedial STEM coaching, and menstrual health supplies to reduce female dropout after grade 8.

title: Mobile Women's Health Clinics — Swabi
description: Roving nurse practitioners, ultrasound referrals, and family planning counselling in underserved tehsils.

title: Indus Basin Community Early Warning
description: Village-level rainfall gauges, SMS/WhatsApp alert trees, and evacuation drills aligned with PDMA protocols.

title: Tharparkar Household Water Safety
description: Solar-powered reverse-osmosis kiosks, brackish mapping, and community water quality dashboards.

title: Urban Heat Resilience — Multan
description: Cool roofs for low-income wards, public hydration points, and heat-stress training for frontline health workers.

title: Mountain Access & Landslide Mitigation
description: Bio-engineered slope stabilization, community sentinel reporting, and resilient market road links for isolated valleys.

title: Primary Care Gap Closure — Islamabad Capital Territory
description: NCD screening, hypertension medication subsidies, and CHW supervision using open-data facility heatmaps.

title: Acute Malnutrition Protocol Scale-up — Quetta
description: OTP sites, ready-to-use therapeutic food supply chain hardening, and caregiver counselling in peri-urban catchments.

title: Women & Girls Digital Literacy Labs
description: After-school labs teaching online safety, freelancing fundamentals, and civic tech tools for adolescent girls.

title: Mangrove Restoration & Coastal Livelihoods
description: Community nurseries, carbon-smart fishing gear exchanges, and women-led ecotourism pilots.
